Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerateTextRequestBuilder

  • Packages that use GenerateTextRequestBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.

    • Uses of GenerateTextRequestBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return GenerateTextRequestBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withCandidateCount​(Integer candidateCount)
      Sets the optional candidate count for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withMaxOutputTokens​(Integer maxOutputTokens)
      Sets the optional maximum output tokens for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
      Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withSafetySettingForToxicity​(HarmBlockThresholdEnum harmBlockThreshold)
      Adds a safety setting for toxicity with the specified block threshold.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withStopSequence​(String stopSequence)
      Adds a stop sequence to the list of stop sequences for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withTemperature​(Double temperature)
      Sets the optional temperature for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withTopK​(Integer topK)
      Sets the optional topK value for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withTopP​(Double topP)
      Sets the optional topP value for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerateTextRequestBuilder.withUserInput​(String userInput)
      Sets the required user input (text prompt) for the text generation request.

    • Uses of GenerateTextRequestBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl that return GenerateTextRequestBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerationResourceImpl.generateTextBuilder​(String userInput)
      Creates a new GenerateTextRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating text.

    • Uses of GenerateTextRequestBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec that return GenerateTextRequestBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder GenerationResource.generateTextBuilder​(String userInput)
      Creates a new GenerateTextRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating text.
